overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game featuring the protagonist exploring a snowy alien outpost. The character approaches a stone building with sci-fi industrial elements, enters a cluttered workshop to loot items including a keycard, interacts with a red protocol droid, and exits back into the snowy streets. The environment blends traditional stone architecture with futuristic technology and warm interior lighting contrasting the cold exterior.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a snowy courtyard between stone buildings covered in icicles. She approaches a large circular metal doorway set into a weathered stone wall, pausing to look up at a mechanism with glowing orange pipes before entering.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered workshop with metal shelving and workbenches

events.description: enters the circular doorway into the dimly lit interior workshop
discovers intel about Kijimi City Ashiga Clan Vault

agents.ego_description: moving through the doorway into a cluttered workshop filled with metal shelves, equipment, and warm artificial lighting

entered.detail: Tall metal racks filled with containers and mechanical equipment
Cluttered work surface with various mechanical parts and tools
Exposed piping and conduits running along ceiling and walls
Window with green glowing light behind metal bars

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit workshop through the circular doorway. The interior features metal shelving units filled with equipment, cluttered workbenches, and industrial pipes along the ceiling. Warm artificial lighting contrasts with the cold exterior as the character discovers intel about a vault.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with scattered containers and tech equipment

events.description: interacts with shelf to pick up Mendo's Vault Keycard
picks up additional items from storage containers

agents.ego_description: searching through shelves and containers, collecting a keycard and other items while exploring the cluttered storage space

entered.detail: Stacked crates and boxes containing tech components and supplies
Cylindrical industrial tank with connected pipes
Large circular green metal door with riveted panels

segments.scene_description: The character explores deeper into the workshop, searching through metal shelving and storage containers. She picks up Mendo's Vault Keycard and other items while moving past industrial equipment and a large green door. The space is cluttered with tech equipment and scattered crates.

scene_state.functional_zone: workshop interior transitioning to snowy alleyway

events.description: initiates dialogue with red protocol droid near the workbench
exits building back into snowy exterior through circular doorway
begins ascending snow-covered stone stairs in the alley

agents.ego_description: approaching and speaking with a red protocol droid, then exiting through the circular doorway and walking up a snowy street

notable_agents.action: red protocol droid standing near workbench, engaging in conversation with the player

entered.detail: Snowy ground with stone paving visible underneath, flanked by stone buildings
Snow-dusted stone steps leading upward between buildings
Warm glowing lanterns mounted on stone walls lighting the alley

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a red protocol droid near a workbench and engages in dialogue. After the interaction, she exits back through the circular doorway into the snowy exterior, then proceeds up a narrow alley with stone stairs and warm wall-mounted lanterns illuminating the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a frozen outdoor courtyard into a cluttered industrial workshop and back out into a snowy alleyway. It begins with the character traversing a courtyard of icicle-covered stone buildings, moving toward a circular metal doorway framed by glowing orange pipes. As she passes through the threshold, the cold exterior gives way to a dimly lit interior filled with metal shelving, industrial ceiling pipes, and warm artificial lighting. The camera then follows her deeper into the workshop, weaving through scattered crates and tech equipment to retrieve a vault keycard before pausing for a dialogue with a red protocol droid. Finally, the scene shifts back through the circular doorway into the snow, proceeding up a narrow stone alley illuminated by warm wall-mounted lanterns.
